allow: Bash(python3 -m py_compile config.py ollama.py pipeline.py main.py)
Bash(python3 -c "from helpers import has_vision_content, get_last_user_text; from config import TOOL_SERVER_URLS; print\('ok'\)")
Bash(CONFIG_PATH=./config.yaml python3 -c "from helpers import has_vision_content; from config import TOOL_SERVER_URLS, ALL_VIRTUAL_MODELS; print\(sorted\(ALL_VIRTUAL_MODELS\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(m['name'] for m in d.get\('models',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(CONFIG_PATH=./config.yaml python3 -c "from config import ALL_VIRTUAL_MODELS, DEEP_PANEL_MIXED, DEEP_PANEL_CLOUD, DEEP_PANEL_LOCAL; print\(sorted\(ALL_VIRTUAL_MODELS\)\); print\('mixed.math:', DEEP_PANEL_MIXED.get\('math'\)\); print\('cloud.math:', DEEP_PANEL_CLOUD.get\('math'\)\); print\('local.math:', DEEP_PANEL_LOCAL.get\('math'\)\)")
